case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. LEAH MARIE COLE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLE, LEAH MARIE $2,911.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,961.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.96 - SERVED OCT-31-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COLE, LEAH MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE-SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.
